case_title: HEJAZI, HENRY VS PACIFIC BELL CO.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEJAZI, HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL CO. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,565.00, $172.75 FOR SERVICE OF CLAIM IS UNREASONABLE. ONLY $50 ALLOWED FOR SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,758.84 FILED BY HEJAZI, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL CO.
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO PACIFIC BELL RETURNED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL CO.
